# What's Changed

## Highlights

- Added the new **Monitor kontenerów** feature in the extension popup, including watchlist management, status tracking, and live updates.
- Added a logged-out indicator on the extension icon so users can immediately see when extension authentication is missing.
- Improved eBrama reliability by handling session loss and repeated `500` responses more safely during active retries.
- Improved popup UX with cleaner layouts, better status visibility, remembered tabs, and refined monitor highlight behavior.

## Included in this release

- New **Monitor kontenerów** tab integrated into the main popup.
- Support for the **PUSTE** status in monitor flows.
- Auth gating for monitor background checks and notifications.
- Delete-all action for monitor entries.
- Live monitor updates while the popup is open.
- Monitor status tooltip and truncation improvements.
- Highlight lifecycle fixes so changes remain visible until popup close.
- Preserve last known monitor status when checks temporarily return empty data.
- Keep eBrama session alive during active retries.
- Logged-out red dot badge on the extension icon.
- Safer release workflow behavior when a development tag already exists.

## Fixes and polish

- Multiple popup alignment and spacing improvements.
- Better status and action button consistency in DCT and monitor views.
- Small notification and modal copy updates.
